title: Lead Business Development Manager at Mahagun Group Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead Business Development Manager at Mahagun Group Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahagun Group Capital India are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahagun Group Capital India:
Mahagun Group Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group Capital India!
